Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class AppExplorationDataConsent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.AppExplorationDataConsent
public class AppExplorationDataConsent extends Metadata

Java class for AppExplorationDataConsent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AppExplorationDataConsent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="applicationName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="availableObjects" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enabledObjects" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isProjectAccessEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="projectName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
